name: AVAM Kinetic Sculpture Race (East Coast Championship)
description: The AVAM Kinetic Sculpture Race (East Coast Championship) is a 15-mile single-day human-powered kinetic sculpture race through Baltimore's urban center, harbor, sand, and mud. Started in 1999 by the American Visionary Art Museum in partnership with Hobart Brown. Held the first Saturday in May. Next race: May 1, 2027 (27th annual).
